name: lazy-scholar
description: Retro arcade platform with modern 3D visual flourishes

scripts.setup: mkdir -p mongodb_data && npm install && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "mongod --dbpath ./mongodb_data" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run start --prefix server"
scripts.dev:nodb: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run start --prefix server"
